suite.name: Epic2 Arrival Notification

kw.name: Setup Test Environment
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=AUTH, url=http://localhost:3001, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '61', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "epic2_driver@test.com", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Adds a cookie to your current session.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.
Retrieves API Tokens, gets target Route UUID, and initializes browser

test.doc: Verify login and valid bookings in MyTrips

test.name: Test 02: Open GPS Tracking Dashboard From MyTrips

kw.name: Try Click Tracking Button
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'ติดตามตำแหน่ง')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'ติดตามตำแหน่ง')]
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Adds a cookie to your current session.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),'การแจ้งเตือน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Change session to passenger and view final trips
test.status: NoSuchWindowException: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.117) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x0000000102c516b4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3127600 1 chromedriver 0x0000000102c49a50 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3095756 2 chromedriver 0x000000010272656c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75432 3 chromedriver 0x00000001026feeb4 chromedriver + 159412 4 chromedriver 0x0000000102798274 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 541616 5 chromedriver 0x00000001027ae148 _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 631428 6 chromedriver 0x0000000102763b9c _RNvCsdExgN8vFLbb_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 326872 7 chromedriver 0x0000000102c10680 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2861308 8 chromedriver 0x0000000102c13dd4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2875472 9 chromedriver 0x0000000102bf5a7c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2751736 10 chromedriver 0x0000000102c14658 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2877652 11 chromedriver 0x0000000102be5ffc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2687608 12 chromedriver 0x0000000102c38d78 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3026932 13 chromedriver 0x0000000102c38ef4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3027312 14 chromedriver 0x0000000102c496a8 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3094820 15 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001920cdc08 _pthread_start + 136 16 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001920c8ba8 thread_start + 8

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: Epic 2 — Arrival Notification: Test Arrival GPS & Manual Triggers
